features: BABY SOFT: Cotton Tree cotton wool balls are perfect for delicate skin, suitable for gently cleansing and caring for a baby's delicate skin. Convenient ready to use pack of 120 soft cotton wool balls
COSMETIC ESSENTIAL: Apply cleansing lotions, skin and eye make up cleansers, oils and powders. Remove make-up and nail polishes.
NATURAL COTTON: Hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use

GENTLE CLEANSING: Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directs to help dissolve makeup,making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate.
description: Product Description ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Convenient ready to use pack of 200 soft cotton wool balls Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Do not pull or rub, especially around the eye area. Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. May cause irritation to those with cotton allergies.
